title: rounding/clamp/lerp family
manager: The everyday numeric-shaping functions — round/floor/ceil/trunc, clamp to a range, lerp between two values — as pinned builtins, so a machine that eases an animation or clamps a sensor reading gets the identical result on every host. These are the functions people reimplement slightly wrong in every codebase; blessing and specifying them removes a whole category of off-by-a-rounding-mode bug that otherwise only shows up on one platform.
cs: round/floor/ceil/trunc (rounding mode explicit), clamp, lerp; pinned semantics (irreversibles #13 blessed infra); cross-host identical.
